approval.approval_note: User approved the P6 in-app alerts work-unit digest after the P5.1 trial-capture verification (stock 2308) passed.
approval.digest_method: json.dumps(ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, compact separators) -> sha256, same canonicalization as scripts/p5_work_unit_digest.py
approval.post_approval_changes: Only the status flip (draft_not_runnable -> approved_pending_implementation) and the embedded approval block; all implementation slices, verification commands, and cannot_claim entries are unchanged from the approved digest.

acceptance_notes: Approval authorizes implementation of the seven slices in the work unit; it does not authorize external delivery channels, provider calls, or any order surface.
Capabilities 5 (simulation) and 2 (delayed feed) remain approved_next and require their own contracts and work-unit approvals after capability 3 completes.
Human acceptance is still required after implementation per the work unit's activation_requirements.
